task.title: Sample enterprise procedure (reference shell)
task.shortdesc: Fictitious shell demonstrating Cisco-style task structure for pattern detection.

context.p: Use this pattern when documenting UI workflows.

step.cmd: Select Policies from the navigation pane.

info.p: The navigation pane may be collapsed; expand it first.

step.cmd: Enter commit in the CLI field.

result.p: The policy appears in the active list.

postreq.p: Verify telemetry shows the policy as active.
